name: ASRock Rack BERGAMOD8-2L2T CEB Server Motherboard - Socket SP5 - 8x DIMM slots (1DPC), supports DDR5 RDIMM, RDIMM-3DS - 2x PCIe5.0 / CXL1.1 x16 - 2x PCIe5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe5.0 / CXL1.1 x8 - 5x MCIO - 2x 10GbE LAN - 2x GbE LAN - Remote Management (IPMI)
shortName: ASRock Rack BERGAMOD8-2L2T CEB Server Motherboard - Socket SP5 - 8x
description: Enterprise server motherboard for EPYC 9005 series with PCIe 5.0/CXL support and IPMI management.
